name: Pesto Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Add the yeast, bread flour, salt, sugar, water, pesto, and lemon juice to the bread machine in the appropriate compartments.
2. Close the lid securely.
3. Select the regular cycle setting on the bread machine.
4. Press start to begin mixing the dough.
5. Allow the machine to complete the baking process.
6. Once finished, remove the loaf from the machine and let it cool before slicing.
